verifyCommand: CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -o /dev/null ./cmd/certstrike && CGO_ENABLED=0 go test ./...
acceptanceCriteria: No ECDSA key generation in PKI exploit path
All follow-up commands use certipy-ad, not certipy
Self-signed fallback skips to next candidate in autopwn
Interactive path selection works with -i flag

features.title: RSA 2048 key generation in all PKI exploit paths
acceptanceCriteria: enroll.go generates RSA 2048 keys (grep for rsa.GenerateKey)
No ecdsa.GenerateKey in enroll.go, adcs.go, or mcp/server.go
C2 and shadow_credentials still use ECDSA (intentional)
PEM type is 'PRIVATE KEY' not 'EC PRIVATE KEY'
Tests pass with RSA keys (TestPFX_RoundTrip checks *rsa.PrivateKey)
features.notes: Root cause fix - certipy-ad and Rubeus require RSA keys

features.title: certipy-ad in all follow-up commands
acceptanceCriteria: No 'certipy auth' or 'certipy relay' or 'certipy cert' in .go files (must be certipy-ad)
All ESC exploit files (adcs.go, esc2-13.go) use certipy-ad in Next steps
pki.go command handler uses certipy-ad for ESC8/ESC11/ESC12 scan output
features.notes: certipy is a different package than certipy-ad

features.title: Correct impacket/PKINITtools command syntax
acceptanceCriteria: PKINIT script uses gettgtpkinit.py not getTGT.py
secretsdump.py pass-the-ticket command uses -dc-ip <DC_IP> and domain (not DC hostname)

features.title: No duplicate PKINIT/UnPAC output in autopwn
acceptanceCriteria: autopwn.go (lib) prints both PKINIT and UnPAC commands
cmd/certstrike/autopwn.go does NOT call PrintPKINITCommands or PrintUnPACCommands
Output appears exactly once when autopwn succeeds
features.notes: Was printing PKINIT twice and UnPAC once extra

features.title: Autopwn skips self-signed fallback certs
acceptanceCriteria: Self-signed certs cause 'skipping' message and continue to next candidate
Only CA-signed certs trigger AutoPwn SUCCESS
features.notes: Was declaring SUCCESS on self-signed fallback certs

features.title: Interactive ESC path selection (-i flag)
features.notes: User requested interactive selection when multiple paths available

features.title: ESC12 enum shows correct relay command (not certstrike)
acceptanceCriteria: pki.go ESC12 enum output uses ntlmrelayx.py -t dcom:// (not certstrike pki --esc 12)
ESC12 scan-only handler (case '12') shows ntlmrelayx command
features.notes: ESC12 is scan-only, was suggesting unsupported certstrike command

features.title: Full build and test suite passes
features.notes: Final gate - everything must compile and tests must pass
